title: Record: Compliance-First Packed Causal Memory + Dirichlet Mixing — val_bpb 0.01654407 (3-seed mean)
author: aamodbhatt

data.description: Packed causal n-gram memory path built from training shards and loaded at eval start; multi-order hashed n-gram tables used for causal scoring.
Dirichlet-normalized multi-order mixing over n-gram orders with count-confidence gating.
Optional packed phrase-suffix expert blended after the n-gram posterior with confidence throttling.

novel_contributions: Packed causal n-gram memory path built from training shards and loaded at eval start
Dirichlet-normalized multi-order mixing with count-confidence gating
Optional packed phrase-suffix expert with confidence throttling
